description: Triggers when user wants to clone a website pixel-perfect, reverse-engineer a UI, or extract design tokens from an existing site
should_trigger: Reverse engineer the UI of my competitor's landing page
Extract design tokens from this website
Replicate the design of this site in Next.js
Analyze and clone this site's layout and styles
Use Firecrawl and Design Copier to copy this site's design
should_not_trigger: Analyze the SEO of my competitor's site
Scrape product prices from a website
Copy the text content from this page
Audit my own website for issues
